content:
Hi guys,

We're still reviewing things, but I wanted to immediately share a couple of English translation changes we're making based on your feedback and suggestions:

1. About Tulu
His **Genesis form name translation will be changed back to Tulu: Godking.**
We'll further adjust his way of speaking. Previously, we translated almost all instances of “余” into "This One," but it tended to sound clunky and unnatural in daily scenarios. 
"This One" will now be treated as **a title Tulu only uses when acting in his official divine capacity.**

2. About Tohuwabohu
We used to translate "祂" into They/Them for Tohuwabohu the Supreme Will. 
We'll **translate it into It/Its from now on so it matches the pronouns commonly used on Azathoth**, the deity Tohuwabohu is based on.

3. About Other Term Changes
Term suggestions will be marked green when we're done implementing them in the game!
The "fishman" term is still being processed as it's taking a bit longer to test the text replacement. 
Also, please **do not delete the content in a term suggestion cell** once it's been implemented; we need that content there so we can easily access which terms have been edited for our records.

Thank you again for your help!
<@&1402540806539051120>
